_value.title: Big Tech Radar: Intuit, Marvell, Microsoft in Focus
_value.description: Gotrade News - The Motley Fool published three June 1 reports flagging Intuit, Marvell, and Microsoft as US big-tech stocks worth watching. Each piece tied the call to a fresh May 29 price move and a distinct catalyst or risk vector.
